title: carpinus henryana
intro: Carpinus henryana, also known as Henry's hornbeam, is a species of flowering plant in the family Betulaceae, native to China. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat a range of health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Carpinus henryana include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce swelling and improve overall well-being. Carpinus henryana is often prepared as a decoction or tea, and can also be used in herbal remedies such as capsules and infusions.
